nasb.text: Obed-edom had sons: Shemaiah the firstborn, Jehozabad the second, Joah the third, Sacar the fourth, Nethanel the fifth,

esv.text: And Obed-edom had sons: Shemaiah the firstborn, Jehozabad the second, Joah the third, Sachar the fourth, Nethanel the fifth,

cnv.text: 俄別．以東有幾個兒子：長子是示瑪雅、次子是約薩拔、三子是約亞，四子是沙甲、五子是拿坦業、

ccb.text: 俄别·以东的长子是示玛雅，次子是约萨拔，三子是约亚，四子是沙甲，五子是拿坦业，
